name: thoth-blueprint
description: Cloud-based site & community planning platform — planning workspace, domain model, and cloud services.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @thoth/domain && npm run build --workspace @thoth/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @thoth/domain && npm run test --workspace @thoth/service-projects && npm run test --workspace @thoth/service-geospatial
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace @thoth/domain && npm run type-check --workspace @thoth/web && npm run type-check --workspace @thoth/service-projects && npm run type-check --workspace @thoth/service-geospatial
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @thoth/domain && npm run lint --workspace @thoth/service-projects && npm run lint --workspace @thoth/service-geospatial
